---
title: "Session 3: Visualisation"
pagetitle: "Session 3"
---

# OD Transport data visualisation

This session covers visualisation techniques for transport data.

## Learning objectives

- Create static maps with tmap
- Build interactive maps
- Visualise flow data
- Use flowmapblue for interactive flow maps

## Static maps with tmap

```r
library(tmap)
library(sf)

# Plot zones and flows
tm_shape(zones) +
  tm_polygons(col = "grey90") +
  tm_shape(desire_lines) +
  tm_lines(col = "all", lwd = "all", scale = 5)
```

## Interactive maps

```r
tmap_mode("view")
tm_shape(desire_lines) +
  tm_lines(col = "all", lwd = "all")
```
